abilities.name: Moonlit Slumber
abilities.desc: Put an enemy to sleep for 30 seconds (6 sec vs players). Damage dealt will end the effect.While sleeping, you drain 98 mana from them every 3 sec.

abilities.name: Tyrande's Guidance
abilities.desc: Increases the critical damage dealt by Starfire Shot by 20%.

abilities.name: Elune's Favor
abilities.desc: Hand of Elune and Touch of Moonlight now heal for an additional 50% of their value over 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Celestial Form
abilities.desc: Ascend into a celestial form for 15 seconds, increasing your critical strike chance by 10%.While active, critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of all healing spells by 10% and apply a Scattered Star to your target and up to 4 enemies within 5 yds of them.

abilities.name: Protected by the Stars
abilities.desc: Increases your Armor by 300% of your Intellect and reduces the duration of stuns and disarms against you by -25%.

abilities.name: Star Citizen
abilities.desc: Increases effectiveness of Celestial Mind by 20%.

abilities.name: Galaxy
abilities.desc: Your Scattered Stars can now stack 2 additional times.

abilities.name: Unleashed Wisps
abilities.desc: Dealing damage with Scattered Stars has a 30% chance to launch a Wisp at your target, dealing 80 + 13.5% arcane SP Arcane damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Warden Training
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -25%.

abilities.name: The Stars Align
abilities.desc: Increases your maximum mana by 10%.

abilities.name: Scattering Blades
abilities.desc: Your Warden's Blade now increases the chance to trigger Aspect of the Warden by 10% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Goddess
abilities.desc: While active, your healing done is increased by 10% and your spells and abilities will not be able to miss.In addition, consuming Scattered Stars now heals up to 5 allies around the target for 73 + 14.97% healing.

abilities.name: Bright Moon
abilities.desc: Allows Lunar Phase to stack 4 additional times.

abilities.name: Mu'sha's Resilience
abilities.desc: Reduces Arcane damage taken by -15%.

abilities.name: Cosmic Shift
abilities.desc: Shift the target ally out of the physical plane, granting improved stealth for 10 seconds.Does not break on damage taken.

abilities.name: Elune's Blessing
abilities.desc: Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%.Does not stack with similar effects.

abilities.name: Rippling Moonwater
abilities.desc: Your healing effects now apply Moonwater to the target, stacking 5 times.MoonwaterDealing damage will consume a stack to heal you.

abilities.name: Goddess Watch Over
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Aspect of the Goddess by 25%.

abilities.name: Moonstone Hilt
abilities.desc: Increases your parry chance by 2% and block value by 15%.

abilities.name: Final Prayer
abilities.desc: Your Prayer of Elune now dispels 1 additional effect.

abilities.name: Star-Guided Arrows
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Scattered Stars now has a 25% chance to refresh a charge of Trueshot.

abilities.name: Will of Elune
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Aspect of the Stars now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Cosmos
abilities.desc: Melee and ranged damage dealt has a 40% chance to slow enemy movement speed by -20% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times and apply Scattered Stars.Scattered StarsCan be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: Omnipresent Moon
abilities.desc: Your Lunar Lances now strikes an additional nearby enemy.

abilities.name: Moonwell Tides
abilities.desc: Casting Vial of Moonwell Water now additionally heals you equal to 25% of your current mana.

abilities.name: Wrath of the Moon
abilities.desc: Increases your Arcane critical damage dealt by 20%.

abilities.name: Lunar Charge
abilities.desc: After using Shooting Star, your next Celestial Strike, Starsunder or auto attack ends the effect to deal 87 + 28.75% arcane SP + 4.65% AP Arcane damage, increased based on distance travelled.

abilities.name: Umbral Blade
abilities.desc: Consumes Scattered StarsSlash an enemy, dealing 97 + 63.5% arcane SP + 20% AP Arcane damage to them and nearby enemies. Each additional enemy beyond the first takes 20% less damage.

abilities.name: Shooting Star
abilities.desc: Sprint forward with astral magic at your feet, increasing your movement speed by 60% for 4 seconds. While active, you cannot be slowed and cannot stop moving.

abilities.name: Starfire Power
abilities.desc: Casting Starfire Shot now has a 20% chance to grant you Drawstring of Elune for 5 sec.Drawstring of Elune (SLS)Huntress Shot and Starcall apply an additional stack of Scattered Stars and your ranged ability attack range is increased to 50 yds.

abilities.name: Warrior of Elune
abilities.desc: Increases your melee haste by 5% and movement speed by 10%.Movement speed granted by this talent stacks with Moonwalk.

abilities.name: Celestial Surge
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by consuming Scattered Stars by 10%.

abilities.name: Spirit of Vengeance
abilities.desc: Fan of Knives now marks enemies with Vengeance for 10 seconds. Successfully marking an enemy increases the range of your next Astral Blade by 25 yards.Casting Astral Blade on a marked enemy causes it to deal 30% more damage.

abilities.name: Fury of the Stars
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Astral Blade by 10%.

abilities.name: Lethal Pursuit
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fan of Knives by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Warden's Precision
abilities.desc: Your Warden's Blade now launches an additional 2 blades at the target, dealing 49 + 24.5% SP Spellstrike Damage.

abilities.name: Highest Order
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Shadowsong's Mandate by -25% and increases the chance to trigger Warden's Blade by 60%.

abilities.name: Aspect Mastery
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Aspects by 10% and their chance to trigger by 5%.

abilities.name: Elune's Presence
abilities.desc: Gain the blessing of a goddess, granting all party or raid members within 40 yds 20% temporary maximum health for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Pierce The Night
abilities.desc: Your Fan of Knives now applies an additional stack of Scattered Stars to each enemy struck.

abilities.name: Moontouched Weapons
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Aspect of the Warden by POWER1*0.01, scaling with maximum mana.

abilities.name: Dance In The Starlight
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Blanket of Stars by -10 sec.

abilities.name: Blade of the Moon
abilities.desc: Consuming Scattered Stars now has a 15% chance to transform Celestial Strike into Moonblade for 8 seconds.MoonbladeDevastate an enemy, dealing 130% Weapon Damage plus 100% Intellect Arcane damage and regenerating 15% missing mana.

abilities.name: Celestial Divination
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to dodge by 5%.

abilities.name: Moonflares
abilities.desc: Avoiding melee attacks will call down a Moonflare at the attacker, dealing 66 Arcane damage.Can occur only once per second.

abilities.name: Coalesced Resilience
abilities.desc: Reduces your damage taken by an amount equal to 1% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Starbound
abilities.desc: Increases your healing done and received by 10%, doubled while below 20% health.

abilities.name: Starlight Duelist
abilities.desc: Blocking or parrying an attack now increases your damage dealt by 10% for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Font of Magic
abilities.desc: Each time you spend a cumulative 100% of your maximum mana, you heal for 4% of your maximum health.

abilities.name: Cosmic Crown
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Aegis spells by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Lunar Knight
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of your Moonblade and Starsweep by 50% and their chance to critically strike by 20%.

abilities.name: Chosen of the Moon
abilities.desc: Become the chosen of the moon, reducing all Physical damage taken by -60% and taunting all enemies within 8 yds for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Flow of Mana
abilities.desc: Increases your Intellect and Strength by 5%.

abilities.name: Tyrande's Vigilance
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Starfire Shot by -0.5 sec.Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting ranged abilities by 75%.

abilities.name: Ishnu-alah
abilities.desc: Moon Arrow restores an additional 4% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Eclipsing Arrows
abilities.desc: Healing done by Hand of Elune or Touch of Moonlight now marks allies for 20 seconds.Casting Huntress Shot now heals marked allies for 235 + 30% SP.

abilities.name: Cycle of the Moon
abilities.desc: Every 10 seconds, you cycle between Full Moon and New Moon.Full MoonIncreases your critical strike chance by 5%.New MoonDamage dealt has a 25% chance to apply Scattered Stars.

abilities.name: Phase Guider
abilities.desc: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Moonwell Splash and the healing done through Aspect of the Goddess by 20%.

abilities.name: Lunar Splinters
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of consuming Scattered Stars by 10%.

abilities.name: Starfire Barrage
abilities.desc: Every 3rd Starfire Shot transforms Starfire Shot into Starfire Barrage.Starfire BarrageFire an enchanted arrow, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 50 + 40% arcane SP Arcane damage on impact, and an additional 50 + 7.5% arcane SP Arcane damage that applies a Scattered Star every 1 sec for 3 seconds. Scales with modifiers to Starfire Shot.Usable while moving.

abilities.name: Enchanted Well
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Moonwell Splash by -0.3 sec.

abilities.name: Avatar of Vengeance
abilities.desc: Transform into an Avatar of Vengeance, teleporting to your target and increasing your Intellect by 25% for 30 seconds. For the duration, the range of Astral Blade is increased by 30 yards and will teleport you to your target.If your target is an enemy, you strike them dealing 50 + 22% Intellect + 6.5% arcane SP Arcane damage per 1 sec for 8 seconds, scaling with Intellect.

abilities.name: Eye of Elune
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 5%.

abilities.name: Hunter's Sight
abilities.desc: Aspect of the Huntress now increases your chance to hit by 3%.

abilities.name: Moonflow
abilities.desc: Send forth moonwell waters to all nearby party and raid members, healing them for 49 + 22.86% healing.Lunar Eclipse: Triggers with no cooldown and consumes Scattered Stars from enemies you are in combat with within 40 yds.Consume Scattered StarsDeals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8% maximum mana for each Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Cosmic Duality
abilities.desc: Dealing damage grants you Cosmic Harmony, increasing the healing of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5%.Effective healing grants you Cosmic Wrath, increasing the damage of your next ability within 6 seconds by 5%.

abilities.name: On The Hunt
abilities.desc: Starfire Shot now increases the damage the enemy takes from your Huntress Shot by 10% for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

abilities.name: Moonblessed Aspects
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Aspects by 15%.

abilities.name: Lunar Blessing
abilities.desc: Increases your healing done by 3%, plus an additional 3% on Poisoned or Diseased targets.

abilities.name: Tyrande's Training
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Starfire Shot by 10% against Burning targets.

abilities.name: Halt
abilities.desc: Teleport to a target location, silencing all enemies around you for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Moonlit Bulwark
abilities.desc: Grants you a shield for an amount equal to your maximum mana for 10 seconds. Usable while stunned.

abilities.name: Enchanted Stream
abilities.desc: Increases the critical healing of Hand of Elune and Moonflow by 15%.

abilities.name: Blessed By The Stars
abilities.desc: Your ranged damage dealt now has a 15% chance to unleash a Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Rapid Cycle
abilities.desc: Lunar Phase now increases your ranged haste by 4% per stack.

abilities.name: Starcall
abilities.desc: Blast the target enemy and all enemies near them with lunar fire that deals 70 + 33% arcane SP Arcane damage, applying Scattered Stars.Consuming a Scattered Star reduces the remaining cooldown by -1.5 sec.Scattered StarsCan be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: Second Moon
abilities.desc: Every 10th Scattered Star consumed now launches a comet at an enemy dealing 304 + 30% arcane SP Arcane damage to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

abilities.name: Lunar Resplendence
abilities.desc: Increases your healing done to allies below 20% health by 30%.

abilities.name: Sentinel Glaive
abilities.desc: Throw a sentinel glaive at an enemy, dealing Weapon Damage plus 53 as Arcane damage, increased further based on your maximum mana, and increasing their resource costs by 15% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Continual Starfall
abilities.desc: Astral Flares called down by Aspect of the Stars now increase your haste by 3% for 5 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Starlit Finesse
abilities.desc: Increases your hit and critical strike chance by 3%.

abilities.name: Infused Aegis
abilities.desc: Drains 30% Maximum ManaInstantly counterattack any enemy that strikes you from the front in melee for Arcane damage, lasting 10 seconds. Can only occur once per sec per enemy.

abilities.name: Fan of Knives
abilities.desc: Applies 1 Scattered Star Per HitUnleash hidden blades upon nearby enemies, dealing 10 + 30% SP Arcane damage scaling with maximum mana.Consuming a Scattered Star reduces the remaining cooldown of Fan of Knives by -2 sec.Scattered StarsCan be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: Enchanted Water
abilities.desc: Increases the healing of Touch of Moonlight by 10% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35%.

abilities.name: Arrows In The Night
abilities.desc: Your Huntress Shots now strike 3 additional enemies and explode with astral energy for 10 seconds, dealing 30 + 8.14% arcane SP + 3% ranged AP Arcane damage.Damage dealt by Starcall reduces the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Way of the Goddess
abilities.desc: Reduces the duration of harmful magic effects on you by -25%.

abilities.name: Reverse Magic
abilities.desc: Reverse the next spell cast on you within 3 seconds, reflecting it back to its caster.Reversing a spell in this way drains 600 + 20% SP of the attacker's mana.

abilities.name: Starshatter
abilities.desc: Call down the power of the stars, sending forth Elune’s astral light in a line outward from you, stunning enemies struck for 5 seconds and applying a Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Improved Eclipse of Fury
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Eclipse of Fury by 40%.

abilities.name: Arrow of the Goddess
abilities.desc: Fire a star-infused arrow hitting enemies in a line, dealing 400% Ranged Weapon Damage plus POWER1*0.25 Arcane damage, scaling with maximum mana and applying Scattered Stars to them.Scattered StarsCan be consumed by spells to deal additional Arcane Damage. Lasts 30 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: Blanket of Stars
abilities.desc: Cover your shield in a blanket of stars for 8 seconds, increasing your block chance and block value by 100%.

abilities.name: Astral Projection
abilities.desc: Reduces the Energy cost of Celestial Strike and Moon Arrow by -10.

abilities.name: Lunar Cascade
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Moonflow and Prayer of Elune now apply Eclipsing Arrows to the target for 20 seconds.Casting Huntress Shot heals marked allies for 235 + 30% SP.

abilities.name: Trueshot
abilities.desc: Drains 20% Maximum Mana2 Charges, 18 sec rechargeConsumes Scattered StarsFire at your target and enemies near them, dealing Ranged Weapon Damage plus POWER1*0.03+SPA*0.185+40 Arcane damage, scaling with maximum mana.Consume Scattered StarsDeals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8% maximum mana for each Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Prayer of Elune
abilities.desc: Say a prayer to Elune, healing up to 12 allies within 40 yds for 77 + 27.57% healing, and dispel 1 harmful magic effect from them.

abilities.name: Teachings of Elune
abilities.desc: Increases the healing of Hand of Elune and Moonflow by 10%.

abilities.name: Exemplary Draw
abilities.desc: Moon Arrow deals 20% more damage and increases the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Enduring Moon
abilities.desc: Critical strikes now increase the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Starburst
abilities.desc: Applies 1 Scattered Star Per HitSmash up to 8 enemies, dealing 2 + 30% arcane SP + 15% AP Arcane damage, scaling with block value and maximum mana and reducing their attack speed by -20% for 10 seconds.Consuming a Scattered Star reduces the remaining cooldown of Starburst by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Astral Reconstitution
abilities.desc: Surround yourself with lunar light, causing 30% of damage taken to be converted into mana for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Mooncharged Blades
abilities.desc: Blocking an attack allows your next Starsunder to hit an additional nearby enemy and cost -30% less mana.

abilities.name: Vengeful Inspiration
abilities.desc: Increases your attack speed by 10% and causes critical strikes with melee attacks to apply a Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Moonwell
abilities.desc: Creates a zone blessed by moonwell waters for 15 seconds at the target location. All allied players standing within the well receive 25% more healing, and their mana regeneration is increased by 100%.

abilities.name: Starfire Shot
abilities.desc: Consumes Scattered StarsFire an enchanted arrow, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 62+66+POWER1*0.01 Arcane damage, scaling further based on your maximum mana.Consume Scattered StarsDeals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8% maximum mana for each Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Sentinel's Focus
abilities.desc: Starfire Shot now has a 20% chance to fire a free Huntress Shot at the target.

abilities.name: Pulverizing Blade
abilities.desc: Casting Warden's Blade now grants you Pulverizing Blade.Pulverizing BladeNext 5 Starsunders within 20 seconds deal increasing damage, scaling with 10% of Intellect, with each subsequent use, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Shadowsong's Mandate
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 15% for 10 seconds.While active, your damaging critical strikes have a 40% chance to trigger Warden's Blade.

abilities.name: Infused Blades
abilities.desc: Your Astral Blade now has a 30% chance to reset its own cooldown and refund its maximum mana cost.

abilities.name: Enchanted Aegis
abilities.desc: Your successful blocks now have a 50% chance to critically block for twice the normal amount.

abilities.name: Warden's Blade
abilities.desc: Attack with celestial fervor, dealing 150% Weapon Damage and triggering a unique effect based on your active Aspect.Cosmic Renewal (Aspect of the Moonwell)Regenerates 30% of your maximum mana.Warden's Strike (Aspect of the Warden)Reduces healing done to the enemy by -40% for 8 seconds.Star Sear (Aspect of the Stars)Increases the damage of your Lunar Lance by 25%.Cosmic Trap (Aspect of the Cosmos)Throw a magic net trap at an enemy, rooting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage dealt may end the effect.Siphoning Arrow (Aspect of the Huntress)Drains 10% maximum mana from the target.

abilities.name: Night Hunter
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Huntress Saber by -60 sec.

abilities.name: Moonmancer
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Starcall by -50%.

abilities.name: Starsweep
abilities.desc: Consumes Scattered StarsSweep an enemy and all nearby enemies with your astral blade, dealing 30 + 30% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage.Every Scattered Star consumed reduces the cooldown of this spell by -3 sec.Consume Scattered StarsDeals 7 + 18.22% SP Arcane Damage and restores 8% maximum mana for each Scattered Star.

abilities.name: Astral Blade
abilities.desc: Drains 25% Maximum ManaStrike an enemy with precision, dealing 106 + 100% SP + 100% AP Arcane damage, increased further based on your maximum mana.Increases your dealt to the enemy by 15% for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Starbarian
abilities.desc: Increases your haste by 4%.

abilities.name: Astral Aegis
abilities.desc: Drains 30% Maximum ManaFor 10 seconds, direct Magic damage taken will silence the attacker for 1 seconds and deal 57 + 18% arcane SP Arcane damage to them.

abilities.name: Vial of Moonwell Water
abilities.desc: Drink from your enchanted moonwell vial, instantly removing all crowd control effects and making you immune to them for 3 seconds.Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

abilities.name: Touch of Moonlight
abilities.desc: Drains 10% Maximum ManaQuickly heal an ally with Elune's touch, scaling with maximum mana.

abilities.name: Moonstone
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Lunar Lance by 20%.

abilities.name: Lunar Amplification
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Trueshot by 25%.

abilities.name: Stellar Convergence
abilities.desc: Applies Eclipsing Arrows to all party and raid members within 40 yds.

abilities.name: Moonlit Impaler
abilities.desc: Increases your Arcane damage by 5% and your hit chance by 2%.

abilities.name: Full Cycle
abilities.desc: Hand of Elune gains the following Full Moon and New Moon effects.Full Moon: Healing increased by 10%.New Moon: Cost reduced by -10%.

abilities.name: Tear Drops
abilities.desc: Healing through Aspect of the Goddess now increases the target's healing taken from you by 1% for 10 sec, stacking up to 10 times.

abilities.name: Huntress of Elune
abilities.desc: Increases your damage dealt by 5% on enemies further than 30 yds.

abilities.name: Lunar Phasing
abilities.desc: Cosmic Shift now dispels all harmful effects from the target.

abilities.name: Stellar Amplification
abilities.desc: Dealing damage with Scattered Stars now has a 15% chance to make your next Astral Blade free of cost.

abilities.name: Shrouded Stars
abilities.desc: Reduces damage taken by all party and raid members by -3%.Does not stack with similar effects.

abilities.name: Healing Prayers
abilities.desc: Prayer of Elune gains an additional 20% of your bonus healing effects.

abilities.name: Shattered Stars
abilities.desc: Increases the range of Starshatter by 10 yds.

abilities.name: Enduring Hunt
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of Huntress Shot and Trueshot by -15%.

abilities.name: Drawstring of Elune
abilities.desc: Huntress Shot and Starcall apply an additional stack of Scattered Stars and your ranged ability attack range is increased to 50 yds for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Lunar Revelation
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Moonflow by 10%.

abilities.name: Rampaging Waters
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Scattered Stars now increases your healing by 1% and critical strike chance by 1% for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Star-Charged
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of your Aspects by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Lunar Swiftness
abilities.desc: Moon Arrow now reduces the cast time of the next Hand of Elune within 8 seconds by -20%, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Elune's Grace
abilities.desc: Critical heals with Hand of Elune now increase the target's armor by 10% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Flow of Waters
abilities.desc: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

abilities.name: Lunar Prophecy
abilities.desc: Casting Moon Arrow now reduces the cooldown of Prayer of Elune by -3 sec.

abilities.name: Universal Power
abilities.desc: Your Aspect of the Cosmos now stacks 1 additional time.

abilities.name: Moonlight Ripple
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of your Aegis spells by -10%.

abilities.name: Cascade
abilities.desc: Every 8th Scattered Star you consume increases the damage of your next Starcall by 50%.

abilities.name: Nightborne Armaments
abilities.desc: While below 35% health, your damage taken is reduced by -10%.

abilities.name: Constellation Barrier
abilities.desc: Reduces all Magic damage taken by -5%.

abilities.name: Pouch of Stardust
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of consumed Scattered Stars by 10%.

abilities.name: Celestial Prowess
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Lunar Lance and Starfire Shot by 5%.

abilities.name: Starcrash
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by consuming Scattered Stars by 10%.

abilities.name: Vigil of the Watchers
abilities.desc: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.Does not stack with similar effects.

abilities.name: Rally The Sentinels
abilities.desc: Sentinel Glaive now restores 20% of your maximum mana and applies a Scattered Star to the enemy.

abilities.name: Moonveil Screen
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Starsunder and Moonflare by 20%.

abilities.name: Wrath of Elune
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sentinel Glaive by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Starcovered Night
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Blanket of Stars by 4 sec.

abilities.name: Star Pupil
abilities.desc: Your damaging critical strikes now grant you a stack of Star Pupil.Star PupilReduces the cast time of Moonwell Splash by -25% for 8 seconds, stacking 4 times.While this is active, Moonwell Splash is castable while moving.

abilities.name: Pulsar Explosion
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Celestial Cleave by 10% and allows it to affect 1 additional enemies.

abilities.name: Tyrande's Guidance
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your Starburst by 10%.

abilities.name: Starburst Invigoration
abilities.desc: Increases your Energy regeneration by 15%.

abilities.name: Nebula
abilities.desc: Blocking enemy attacks now applies Scattered Stars to the attacker.

abilities.name: Bonds of Justice
abilities.desc: Send forth bonds of justice to an enemy, tethering them to you for 8 seconds.If the tether is broken through expiration or the target runs at least 10 yds from you, they are gripped back towards you, taking 441 + 120% arcane SP Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Lunar Anomaly / Moonlit Lancer
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Lunar Lance by 50%.

abilities.name: Moonwalk / Twinkle Toes
abilities.desc: Increases your movement speed by 20% at night.

abilities.name: Guided Blades / Glaive Tossing
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Warden's Blade by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Cosmic Strides / Moon Runner
abilities.desc: Aspect of the Cosmos no longer slows enemy movement speed. Instead, your melee and ranged attacks now grant you 5% increased movement speed for 4 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Last Prayer / Mending Surge
abilities.desc: Casting Stellar Convergence now resets the cooldown of Prayer of Elune.

abilities.name: Astral Onslaught / Astral Finesse
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Astral Blade by 7 sec.

abilities.name: Astral Combatant / Maiev's Guard
abilities.desc: Lunar Lance and Umbral Blade increase the enemy damage taken from Scattered Stars by 10% for 10 seconds.
